cadence_note: ODEPA publishes on mixed cadences: wholesale fruit/vegetable and flower/foliage prices are captured on business days (martes/jueves) and refreshed continuously, consumer prices weekly, foreign trade (Aduanas) monthly, and the CIREN fruit cadastre annually. A 7-day refresh keeps the fastest (near-daily wholesale price) tables current; the connector re-pulls the full multi-year corpus each run (tens of MB), so slower tables cost nothing extra.
